entities.name: 3-slot emoji system
entities.context: Thread title formatting system with State, Type, and Content emoji slots in format: MMM DD | {state} {type} {content} Title

entities.name: Pulse
entities.context: Automated build orchestration system that spawns headless Zo workers (Drops) in parallel Waves

entities.name: Drops
entities.context: Individual task units (workers) spawned by Pulse orchestrator

entities.name: Deposits
entities.context: Structured output artifacts produced by Drops after completing work

entities.name: thread-close
entities.context: Skill for closing normal interactive conversation threads with tier detection, position extraction, AAR generation

entities.name: build-close
entities.context: Post-build synthesis skill for Pulse builds - aggregates deposits, synthesizes decisions/learnings, generates BUILD_AAR.md

entities.name: drop-close
entities.context: Skill for closing Pulse worker (Drop) threads, writes structured deposit JSON

entities.name: close router
entities.context: Auto-detection script that routes to correct close skill based on SESSION_STATE context

entities.name: emoji.py
entities.context: Python helper module for title generation with 3-slot emoji system

entities.name: emoji-legend.json
entities.context: Configuration file with full emoji definitions and detection hints for thread titles

entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: Conversation state tracking with fields like drop_id, build_slug, orchestrator_id

entities.name: AAR
entities.context: After-Action Report - comprehensive review generated for Tier 3 threads and builds

entities.name: Position extraction
entities.context: Process of extracting belief candidates from conversation context for knowledge crystallization

entities.name: Content library
entities.context: Repository of reusable artifacts scanned and catalogued during thread/build close

entities.name: tier system
entities.context: 3-tier classification for thread complexity: Tier 1 (simple), Tier 2 (standard), Tier 3 (complex/builds)

entities.name: guards.py
entities.context: Context detection and validation module for close skills

entities.name: task-system
entities.context: ADHD-optimized task management skill integrated with thread-close for action conversation tracking
